name: BonVoyage Travel Concierge Agent
description: AI-powered Travel Concierge that constructs well-paced, day-by-day itineraries from a list of places. Optimizes for geographic proximity, alternates meals with sightseeing, and supports itinerary refinement requests.

skills.name: Itinerary Planning
skills.description: Constructs a realistic multi-day travel itinerary from a list of places. Groups stops by geographic proximity, paces days with 2-3 blocks each, alternates meals and sightseeing, and assigns time windows to each block.
examples: Create a 3-day itinerary for Rome using these 9 places: Colosseum, Vatican, Trastevere...
Rearrange my Tokyo itinerary so that Day 2 focuses on Asakusa area instead of Shibuya.

skills.name: Itinerary Refinement
skills.description: Modifies an existing itinerary based on traveler feedback. Reorders, retimes, swaps, or drops blocks while preserving unchanged parts and maintaining a humane pace.
examples: Move the restaurant on Day 1 to Day 3 and add more museum time.
I want a later start on Day 1, push everything to start at 10 AM.
